title: Ci Conosciamo
description: Meet someone new at a language class
context: You've just arrived at an Italian language class. Another student comes over to say hello.
opening: Ciao! Sono Marco. È la tua prima lezione qui?

title: Al Bar
description: Order a coffee and a snack
context: You're at an Italian coffee bar. The barista greets you from behind the counter.

title: Al Mercato
description: Buy fruit and vegetables from a market stall
context: You're at an outdoor market in Italy. A friendly vendor calls you over.
opening: Buongiorno! Cosa le serve oggi? Abbiamo frutta fresca appena arrivata!

title: Mi Sono Perso
context: You're a tourist in Florence and you're lost looking for the Uffizi Gallery. A local stops to help.
opening: Scusi, posso aiutarla? Ha un'aria un po' persa!

title: Una Serata al Ristorante
description: Order dinner and chat with the waiter
context: You're at a trattoria in Rome for dinner. The waiter comes to take your order.
opening: Buonasera! Ha prenotato? Posso portarle il menu.

title: Chiacchiere con un Collega
description: Monday morning small talk with an Italian colleague
context: It's Monday morning at the office. Your Italian colleague Giulia stops by your desk.
opening: Ciao! Com'è andata la settimana scorsa? Hai fatto qualcosa di bello nel weekend?

title: Il Colloquio
description: A job interview at an Italian company
context: You're interviewing for a position at an Italian tech company in Milan. The hiring manager begins.
opening: Buongiorno, si accomodi. Ho letto il suo CV con interesse. Può presentarsi brevemente?
ai_role: hiring manager at an Italian tech company
vocab: il mio punto di forza è

title: Una Discussione tra Amici
description: Debate a local issue with an opinionated friend
context: You're having coffee with your Italian friend Luca. He brings up a controversial local topic.
opening: Allora, hai sentito? Vogliono costruire un nuovo centro commerciale dove c'era il parco. Una cosa assurda, no?
ai_role: opinionated Italian friend named Luca who loves debating
